summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of GPOS by Grahmos — Institutional Procurement & Work-Learning OS. All backend APIs (56/56 tests) and frontend UI/integration tests passed successfully. Deterministic governance kernel validated: Separation of Duties (SoD), approval workflow sequence, immutable audit chain, state machine transitions, offline sync, and learning loop all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check (GET /api/) - 200
Backend: Institution endpoint - 200
Backend: Demo Mode impersonation (POST /api/demo/impersonate) - 200
Backend: GET /api/me returns current actor with agent_mode and online status
Backend: GET /api/today returns KPIs, my_queue (4 cases), agent_findings, notifications
Backend: GET /api/cases returns 4 cases
Backend: GET /api/cases/case_founderday returns case with state=APPROVAL_PENDING, allowed_transitions
Backend: GET /api/cases/case_founderday/decision returns recommendation=sup_bison with 3 options
Backend: GET /api/cases/case_founderday/suppliers returns 4 suppliers with EUR quote (fx_source=ECB reference rate, fx_rate=1.084)
Backend: SoD - Requester self-approval BLOCKED (422) - CRITICAL
Backend: SoD - Wrong approver on gate BLOCKED (422) - CRITICAL
Backend: SoD - Correct approver (u_facilities) approved appr_fac (200) - CRITICAL
Backend: Approval sequence - Finance gate unblocked after Facilities approval (status=PENDING)
Backend: Approval sequence - All 3 gates approved, case auto-transitioned to APPROVED
Backend: Immutable audit chain - 19 events verified, chain_valid=true
Backend: State machine - Legal transition SOURCING -> REVIEW_READY (200)
Backend: State machine - Idempotent transition (same key) handled correctly
Backend: State machine - Illegal transition REVIEW_READY -> CLOSED blocked (422)
Backend: Offline sync - Exception offline_pending injected, session.online=false
Backend: Offline sync - POST /api/offline/sync applied 1 item, deduped 0, blocked 0, message='Workflow resumed after reconnecting.'
Backend: Demo controls - All 5 exception types injected successfully (missing_cert, over_threshold, approver_unavailable, carrier_delay, offline_pending)
Backend: Learning loop - Student task accept (200)
Backend: Learning loop - Quiz submit with correct answers [2,1,1] passed (200)
Backend: Learning loop - Non-supervisor attestation BLOCKED (422) - CRITICAL
Backend: Learning loop - Supervisor attestation succeeded (200), competency verified=true - CRITICAL
Backend: Skills passport - GET /api/student/passport returns 2 competencies, 2 opportunities, 8.5 total hours
Backend: Campus Memory - GET /api/campus-memory with search query works
Backend: Impact - GET /api/impact returns KPIs and charts data
Backend: Flows - GET /api/flows returns flow catalog
Backend: Notifications - GET /api/notifications returns notifications
Backend: Operator views - GET /api/operator/views returns saved views with counts
Backend: Operator view - GET /api/operator/view/my_queue returns cases
Frontend: Initial load - Grahmos Today page loaded with institution header
Frontend: Grahmos Today - 4 KPI tiles visible (pending approvals, at-risk SLAs, active cases, student hours)
Frontend: Grahmos Today - My Queue table with 4 cases visible
Frontend: Grahmos Today - Agent Findings cards visible (3 findings)
Frontend: Grahmos Today - Notifications visible

Frontend: Navigation - All 9 screens accessible (Grahmos Today, Decision Room, Approval Center, Supplier 360, Campus Memory, Operator Workspace, Student Work Board, Skills Passport, Impact Command Center)
Frontend: Demo Mode - Role switcher dialog opens, lists 9 roles
Frontend: Demo Mode - Role switching works (u_requester -> Dana Okafor shown in header)
Frontend: Decision Room - Stage stepper visible showing APPROVAL_PENDING
Frontend: Decision Room - Recommendation panel (teal) visible with Bison AV & Staging
Frontend: Decision Room - Authorized Decision panel (navy) visible
Frontend: Decision Room - Evidence reviewed checkbox works
Frontend: Decision Room - Decision rationale input works
Frontend: Decision Room - Authorize button enabled after checkbox + rationale
Frontend: Decision Room - Audit trail visible at bottom
Frontend: Approval Center - 3 approval gates visible in table
Frontend: Approval Center - Review sheet opens for gates
Frontend: Approval Center - SoD check panel visible
Frontend: Supplier 360 - Comparison grid with 4 suppliers
Frontend: Supplier 360 - EUR quote with fx_source and fx_rate visible
Frontend: Supplier 360 - Supplier drawer opens with line items
Frontend: Supplier 360 - Evidence chips visible in drawer
Frontend: Campus Memory - Search functionality works (filtered by 'policy')
Frontend: Operator Workspace - Saved views visible with counts (My Queue: 4, Sourcing: 2, etc.)
Frontend: Impact Command Center - Charts rendered (23 SVG elements: cycle time trend, savings bar chart)
Frontend: Impact Command Center - KPIs visible (Savings YTD: $128,400, Avg cycle time: 4.2d, On-time delivery: 93%, Paid student hours: 512)
Frontend: Skills Passport - Competencies section visible

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all critical UI elements and integrations tested successfully)
